title: Ken Gharial Sanctuary
tagline: Ken Gharial Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Ken Gharial Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in Panna and Chhatarpur Districts of Madhya Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Ken Gharial Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in Panna and Chhatarpur Districts of Madhya Pradesh, India. It was established for the conservation of gharial and mugger crocodile populations in 1981.

topPlaces.name: Bhopatpur
topPlaces.description: Bhopatpur is a village in Kaushambi district, Uttar Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Raneh Falls
topPlaces.description: The Raneh Falls is a natural waterfall on the Ken River, located in Khajuraho in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Urmil River
topPlaces.description: The Urmil River is a significant water source in the Chhatarpur district of Madhya Pradesh, India. It flows through the Chhatarpur district, merging with the Ken River.

items.note: Bhopatpur is a village in Kaushambi district, Uttar Pradesh, India.
The Raneh Falls is a natural waterfall on the Ken River, located in Khajuraho in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.
The Urmil River is a significant water source in the Chhatarpur district of Madhya Pradesh, India. It flows through the Chhatarpur district, merging with the Ken River.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ken Gharial Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ken Gharial Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ken Gharial Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kanpur Airport (175 km) and the nearest railway station is Satna Junction (83 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ken Gharial Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ken Gharial Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ken Gharial Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Ken Gharial Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ken Gharial Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhopatpur, Raneh Falls, Urmil River.
